title: Pixelmon Forever
description: Play and have fun with over 1000+ Pokemon and venture out with them!
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4aba9915b96aed4ce56e8437c2c46521e0fe93f.png)
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b4a7142675e7a1083082398474dbed733e57519.png)
The Pixelmon is a mod that includes Pokemon into the Minecraft world. Catch, train, battle and even trade your favorite Pokemon with strangers and friends.

Also, we added mods and optimizations to improve your experience even more!

 

Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c359729c8f3e19ab38ec6d47a722b4bd871f4068.png)

                                                              1000+ Pokémon

                                                                   Gyms

                                                   Mega Evolution, Z-Moves and Dynamax

                                                               Egg Hatching

                                                               Shiny Pokémon

                                                                  IVs/EVs

                                                               And much more!
[Click here to get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://bisecthosting.com/SHADOW)                                                               
![get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba826d886ad92cc3c1f4804db33b286c9e51d89f.png)
